# CapabilityNegotiation.MayUseUrlElicitation method

A server MUST NOT use URL-mode elicitation unless `elicitation.url` is present (R-6.2-g). Mirrors TS `mayUseUrlElicitation`.

```csharp
public static bool MayUseUrlElicitation(JsonObject clientCaps)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| clientCaps | The client's declared capabilities. |

## Return Value

`true` when URL-mode elicitation is permitted.
